node.text: Flaunt it 💫
Flight Simulator has come a long way. ✨

Feeling very pastel. 💗💛💙💜 
Designed for Xbox Spring Collection featuring @powera_gaming, @otterbox, @8bitdo.
📍 Tokyo, Japan
“We do have to understand ourselves first.” Stephanie J. Creary, Wharton School Assistant Professor, shares her perspective on identity and inclusion. What does inclusion mean to you?
3,427 if we’re being honest. 📧

This is how you Microsoft Paint. 

Inspired by Edvard Munch’s iconic piece, The Scream.

node.text: Is it Clippy or Clippit to you?
Millennials, rejoice. The logo of a generation.
They’re so quick with it.
Most people want to be fair and objective, but to be biased is to be human. Let’s challenge ourselves to explore our own biases, and work to disrupt them.
📍 Costa Rica
Let us know in the comments.
Difficult conversations and being honest. ✅ UCLA and Columbia Law School Professor Kimberlé Crenshaw shares insights on intersectionality and inequality.
Let’s boot up the desktop and bring this one back.
The newest Microsoft Development Center in Noida, a satellite town of India’s capital in New Delhi.
Crispy. 🌊
Don’t feel ju

Microsoft ❤️ Activision Blizzard. The joy and community of gaming continues … for all of us.
Details in our Story.
Accelerate your inclusion journey throughout 2022 and beyond.
From the archives. 🗃 Our logo and slogan from 40 years ago. 😱

From an extensive solar panel system that will offset energy consumption up to 20%, to an integrated water management system set up for the campus to achieve net-zero non-potable water certification, nature is the building block of our Silicon Valley campus.
One time for the memories.
An excellent view of Seito Bridge courtesy of the next generation of Microsoft Flight Simulator.
This is asking a lot?

node.text: 2022 on the horizon. 👀

node.text: A cozy Microsoft cabin. And it’s snowing.
Be the hero.
(Work from) Home for the Holidays.
This week’s end brings us a traditional Chilean holiday beverage, Cola de Mono. The perfect blend of milk, sugar, coffee, aguardiente, and winter spices such as cinnamon and cloves.
Mixed reality brings @NationalTheatre’s All Kinds of Limbo XR to life for a communal musical performance. Check out our Story for more.
The Microsoft Dublin campus takes "the floor is lava" to the next level: pixels.
We don’t mean to spoil the surprise, but the gift is the wrapping paper.

Have you ever felt like you needed to alter some aspect of yourself in order to fit in?
.
We tend to feel pressure to cover when we get the sense that being our true selves could become a barrier to being accepted.
Here’s to an end of week holiday beverage feature. Sujeonggwa (수정과 is a Korean traditional cinnamon punch. It blends together cinnamon and ginger and is often garnished with pine nuts.

‘Tis the season.

You may ask yourself how it’s possible to make a jello mold this perfect. Check out our Story for more.
Do you have someone who helps you be a better ally? Tag them in our replies to show them love.
Retro vibe. 💚
Haven’t done one of these in a while. 🥰
2021 am I right?
Speakers or Xbox?
Click around and find out.
An email that starts like this can go one of two ways. 👀
📍 Home.
How about some (more) pie?
Flight Simulator. Snowy landing. ❄️
Family gatherings. 🎮
Are you an artist?
😩 want.

Dr. Keene is here with an important reminder.
.
Dr. Adrienne Keene is Assistant Professor of American Studies and Ethnic Studies at Brown University. Her research focuses on college access for Native (American Indian, Alaska Native, and Native Hawaiian) students and the role of precollege access programs in student success.

How it started ➡️ How it’s going.
Happy 20th, @Xbox 🎉
How it started ➡️ How it’s going
Windows 11 on 11/11

Ancient Olympia stood more than 2,000 years ago. We partnered with the Hellenic Ministry of Culture and Sports to digitally preserve this historic site and bring it to life for you. Check out our story to learn more. #MicrosoftAi #MinCultureGr

node.text: Did you know Teams has dark mode?
Could eat but then would feel bad about eating.
A Microsoft Paint masterpiece. 🤯 Cc: Twitter artist @ weofrito.
The OG.
A brand new way to start your emails.
That’s the save button, no?
The Scream. 😱 Inspired by Edvard Munch’s iconic piece, this Microsoft Paint art is so good it’s scary.
Trick or treat?
2021 costume idea.

node.text: We're serious about decarbonization. So serious, in fact, that we've made it a throwback 16-bit game.
Dracula’s standing desk.
Instant classic. 🍿
It’s a frightfully good surprise.
Shaking in our boots.
A pop of color.
Caption contest! Drop your best caption in our replies.
The itsy bitsy spiderweb logo. 🕷
Scary cool.
Grab your popcorn. The hills are alive.
This is our redesigned paperclip emoji (swipe to check out the original). Please fill our replies with 📎.
This deserves 100k likes.
Swamp thing.
This is our redesigned fire emoji (swipe to check out the original). Please fill our replies with 🔥.

Swipe to recycle these ocean plastics. 

The shell of this eco-friendly mouse is made with 20% recycled ocean plastic, a breakthrough in materials technology that begins with the removal of plastic waste from oceans and waterways. One small step forward in our sustainability journey.
Happy October.
Bloomberry flavored ice cream. Yes. #Windows11.
Windows 11. Windows Eleven. #Windows11
Do you Excel at math?
Clippy caption contest! Drop your best caption in our replies.
Word? Word. Always in style.
Modern day Microsoft Paint.
WordArt.
This is our redesigned ghost emoji (swipe to check out the original). Please fill our replies with 👻.
Outfit of the day.
*mutes mic*

This Hispanic Heritage Month we highlight the voices that bridge a rich and proud history with a vibrant and dynamic future. More on this design ⬇️

Inspiration was easy to come up with. It was found in the ruffled skirt of a Spanish flamenco dancer, in the magnificent Aconcagua peak in Argentina, and in the hand-drawn geometric lines and shapes in indigenous Latin American art. Swipe through to catch them in action.
